name: Roasted Trout with Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except fish and bacon in a bowl; mix well.
2. Brush the Worcestershire sauce mixture on both sides of the fish.
3. Place the fish in a buttered baking dish.
4. Score the skin of the fish with a sharp knife in two or three places.
5. Top each piece of fish with a strip of bacon.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 10 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily when pierced with a fork.
8. Baste the fish frequently with pan juices during baking.
9. Serve and enjoy. Makes 6 large servings.
